texto: Many gardeners will agree that hand-weeding is not the terrible drudgery that it is often made out to be. Some people find in it a kind of soothing monotony. It leaves their minds free to develop the plot for their next novel or to perfect the brilliant repartee with which they should have encountered a relative's latest example of unreasonableness.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Christopher Lloyd sobre temas ligados a motivacao. A afirmação “Many gardeners will agree that hand-weeding is not the terrible drudgery that it is often made ou…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a motivacao, creativity, gardening, útil em momentos de inspiracao e estudos.
